india_trends.title: TVS, other investors keen to buy into Jana Small Finance Bank
india_trends.summary: Jana Small Finance Bank is poised for a significant capital infusion. The TVS Venu Group plans to acquire a 10% stake. Several other investors are also lining up to invest. This marks Jana's first equity raise since going public. The bank's capital adequacy ratio remains strong. TPG Capital may part

india_trends.title: Air India weighed down by external shocks: Singapore Air CEO
india_trends.summary: Air India's losses have significantly impacted Singapore Airlines' annual profit. Geopolitical issues, airspace closures, and currency fluctuations are cited as key reasons. Despite these challenges, Singapore Airlines remains committed to Air India's long-term turnaround. The airline is a core part

india_trends.title: Curbs on compressor imports could hit supply of ACs & refrigerators, warn companies
india_trends.summary: The concern follows a May 8 order by the Department for Promotion of Industry and Internal Trade (DPIIT), which links compressor imports in the current fiscal to a percentage of volumes imported in FY25.

india_trends.title: Delhi high street retailers push NDMC to rework property tax
india_trends.summary: At the New Delhi Municipal Corporation (NDMC) under which these markets come, the property tax is up to 25% of the rent collected while in other parts of Delhi it's just 2-3%.

india_trends.title: LVMH to sell Marc Jacobs to WHP, G-III
india_trends.summary: LVMH has taken a bold step by selling the iconic Marc Jacobs fashion label to a partnership formed by WHP Global and G-III Apparel Group. Marc Jacobs will still hold the reins as creative director, ensuring the brand's identity remains intact.

india_trends.title: Import tariff values for gold, silver raised
india_trends.summary: India's customs board has increased import tariff values for gold and silver. This move aims to manage import costs due to global commodity price changes. Edible oils like palm and soybean oil also see minor adjustments. These new valuations will be effective from May 16, 2026. Policymakers are also

india_trends.title: Diageo top executives to exit as CEO pushes for revamp
india_trends.summary: In a bold transformation, Diageo is embracing a new era under the leadership of CEO Dave Lewis. With an eye for innovation, Lewis is executing a profound restructuring, bidding farewell to several key figures in departments like marketing, Africa, and human resources.

india_trends.title: GST Tribunal revamps appeal process: Division bench review now mandatory for appeals
india_trends.summary: The move seeks to prevent smaller benches from deciding cases involving important legal questions, ensure consistent rulings, and streamline the process of resolving disputes.

india_trends.title: Petrol exports to attract ₹3/litre excise duty
india_trends.summary: New Delhi is shaking up its energy export policy with the introduction of a specialized excise duty on petrol exports. india_trends.title: Fuel price hike may push inflation up by 20 bps, say experts
india_trends.summary: Fuel prices have risen, potentially pushing retail inflation up by 0.15 to 0.20 percentage points. Experts warn this could lead to wider price increases across the economy. Higher transport and logistics costs are expected to impact various sectors. This development follows recent increases in gold

india_trends.title: Eating out or ordering online may soon cost more: Food services set to become 5–10% costlier starting next week amid fuel price hike
india_trends.summary: Eating out and ordering food will soon cost more. Fuel prices have increased, impacting restaurant expenses. This will lead to a 5-10% rise in prices for consumers. Restaurants are facing higher costs for fuel, LPG, and labor. Some chains will adjust menu prices next week, while others will do so in

india_trends.title: Steel safeguard measure hits India-UK trade pact rollout
india_trends.summary: India's trade deal with the UK is delayed by new British steel rules. Officials are seeking a creative solution for early implementation. Meanwhile, India and the US are nearing an interim trade agreement. India also aims to boost exports to $1 trillion by 2026-27, with ongoing reviews for pacts wit

india_trends.title: Textile industry seeks cotton import duty cut as prices surge 25%, output falls short
india_trends.summary: Indian textile makers are urging the government to abolish the 11% import duty on raw cotton. Domestic prices have surged by 25% in two months. Production is also expected to fall short of initial forecasts. Manufacturers face stiff competition from countries with duty-free cotton imports. This dema

india_trends.title: SpaceX accelerates IPO timeline, targets June 11 pricing on Nasdaq
india_trends.summary: Elon Musk’s SpaceX is accelerating its IPO plans, with pricing expected around June 11 and a potential market debut by June 12 on Nasdaq. The company has fast-tracked filings after a quicker SEC review, moving ahead of its earlier late June timeline as it eyes strong investor demand.

india_trends.title: SpaceX accelerates IPO timeline, targets Nasdaq debut by mid-June
india_trends.summary: The schedule has been moved forward from an earlier late-June target, partly due to faster-than-expected regulatory review
